1.$description: Minimal gaps — between route dots, label margins

1-5.$description: Small gaps — button gaps, star gaps, icon-text spacing

2.$description: Standard small — card padding, section gaps, button gaps

2-5.$description: Input padding, card padding, ride card margins, footer padding

3.$description: Component gaps — card padding, nav tab gaps, section margins

3-5.$description: Card padding (driver section), notification row padding

4.$description: Standard — card padding, page margins, modal margins

5.$description: Page horizontal padding, modal padding, search bar padding

6.$description: Page top padding, modal top padding, section spacing

x.$description: Page horizontal padding — consistent across all pages

sm.$description: Compact card padding — stats, price sections

md.$description: Standard card padding — driver section, notifications

lg.$description: Generous card padding — route cards, car details

navClearance.$description: Bottom scroll padding to clear fixed nav
